prophecies.q: 波力斯卡描述火星文明
prophecies.a: 火星上曾经有一个伟大的文明，火星人身高约七英尺，能够呼吸二氧化碳。他们的技术非常先进，可以进行星际旅行。火星表面现在看起来荒芜，但地下仍有幸存者居住。
prophecies.a_en: There was once a great civilization on Mars. Martians were about seven feet tall and could breathe carbon dioxide. Their technology was very advanced, capable of interstellar travel. The Martian surface now appears barren, but survivors still live underground.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2026年，NASA火星探测器（好奇号、毅力号）及欧洲航天局项目未发现任何火星文明遗迹或地下生命存在的证据。火星大气以二氧化碳为主，但未检测到生物活动迹象。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of 2026, NASA Mars rovers (Curiosity, Perseverance) and ESA missions have found no evidence of Martian civilization remains or underground life. Mars atmosphere is mostly CO2, but no biosignatures have been detected.
prophecies.yearReason: 波力斯卡在采访中提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Boriska mentioned this year in interviews

prophecies.q: 波力斯卡讲述火星核战争
prophecies.a: 火星文明毁灭于一场毁灭性的核战争。火星人之间爆发了冲突，使用了核武器，摧毁了整个星球的大气层。幸存者被迫转移到地下城市生活。我就是当时的一名火星飞行员。
prophecies.q_en: Boriska describes the nuclear war on Mars
prophecies.a_en: Martian civilization was destroyed by a devastating nuclear war. Conflict erupted among the Martians and they used nuclear weapons, destroying the planet's entire atmosphere. Survivors were forced to retreat to underground cities. I was a Martian pilot at that time.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 科学界对火星大气消失的主流解释是太阳风剥蚀和火星磁场消失，发生在约40亿年前，与核战争无关。NASA MAVEN任务（2014年）的数据支持太阳风假说。
prophecies.verdict_en: The scientific consensus for Mars atmosphere loss is solar wind stripping due to the disappearance of Mars' magnetic field, occurring about 4 billion years ago, unrelated to nuclear war. NASA's MAVEN mission (2014) data supports the solar wind hypothesis.
prophecies.yearReason: 波力斯卡在采访中提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Boriska mentioned this year in interviews

prophecies.q: 波力斯卡提及狮身人面像的秘密
prophecies.a: 吉萨大狮身人面像的耳朵后面隐藏着一个秘密机关。当它被打开时，人类的生活将彻底改变。里面保存的知识将改变整个世界。但打开的时间还没有到来。
prophecies.q_en: Boriska mentions the secret of the Sphinx
prophecies.a_en: Behind the ear of the Great Sphinx of Giza, there is a hidden mechanism. When it is opened, human life will be completely transformed. The knowledge preserved inside will change the entire world. But the time to open it has not yet come.

prophecies.q: 波力斯卡警告地球核战争
prophecies.a: 地球面临着和火星一样的危险。如果人类不停止战争和核武器试验，地球也会像火星一样被毁灭。地球人必须改变自己的行为，否则将面临同样的命运。
prophecies.q_en: Boriska warns of nuclear war on Earth
prophecies.a_en: Earth faces the same danger as Mars. If humans do not stop wars and nuclear weapons testing, Earth will be destroyed just like Mars. Earthlings must change their behavior, or they will face the same fate.

prophecies.q: 波力斯卡谈论灵性进化
prophecies.a: 地球正在进入一个新的意识层次。越来越多的孩子出生时就拥有特殊的能力和知识，他们来到地球是为了帮助人类度过即将到来的变革。人类的意识将会提升，但这个过程需要时间。
prophecies.a_en: Earth is entering a new level of consciousness. More and more children are being born with special abilities and knowledge, and they come to Earth to help humanity through the coming transformation. Human consciousness will be elevated, but this process takes time.

prophecies.q: 波力斯卡谈论靛蓝儿童
prophecies.a: 地球上有很多像我一样的孩子，我们被称为靛蓝儿童。我们拥有特殊的能力，有些人能看到其他人看不到的东西，有些人拥有超常的直觉。我们是被派来帮助地球人的。
prophecies.a_en: There are many children on Earth like me, we are called indigo children. We have special abilities — some can see things others cannot, some have extraordinary intuition. We were sent to help the people of Earth.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 「靛蓝儿童」概念源于1982年南希·安·塔佩的著作《透过色彩理解你的生命》，并非科学概念。美国儿科学会和心理学界未承认此概念，认为所谓的「靛蓝特征」通常可用注意力缺陷多动障碍（ADHD）等已知状况解释。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 'indigo children' concept originated from Nancy Ann Tappe's 1982 book 'Understanding Your Life Through Color'. It is not a scientific concept. The American Academy of Pediatrics and mainstream psychology do not recognize it, noting that so-called 'indigo traits' can typically be explained by known conditions such as ADHD.
prophecies.yearReason: 波力斯卡在采访中提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Boriska mentioned this year in interviews

prophecies.q: 波力斯卡描述利莫里亚文明
prophecies.a: 地球上曾经存在一个叫做利莫里亚（列穆里亚）的古老文明，他们非常高大，拥有先进的技术。利莫里亚人与火星人有联系。我在火星生活时曾经到过地球，见过利莫里亚人。他们的文明因为不再注重灵性修行而灭亡了。
prophecies.a_en: There was once an ancient civilization on Earth called Lemuria. They were very tall and possessed advanced technology. Lemurians had connections with Martians. When I lived on Mars, I visited Earth and met Lemurians. Their civilization perished because they stopped pursuing spiritual development.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 利莫里亚（列穆里亚）最初由动物学家菲利普·斯克莱特于1864年提出，用于解释狐猴分布，后被板块构造理论取代。考古学和地质学未发现任何支持利莫里亚大陆或文明存在的证据。该概念现被归类为伪考古学。
prophecies.verdict_en: Lemuria was originally proposed by zoologist Philip Sclater in 1864 to explain lemur distribution, later superseded by plate tectonics theory. Archaeology and geology have found no evidence supporting the existence of a Lemurian continent or civilization. The concept is now classified as pseudoarchaeology.
prophecies.yearReason: 波力斯卡在采访中提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Boriska mentioned this year in interviews

prophecies.q: 波力斯卡描述火星人的飞行技术
prophecies.a: 火星人的飞船是等离子驱动的，可以在宇宙中自由穿梭。飞船形状是圆形的，有多层结构。他们还拥有时间旅行的能力，可以在不同的时间维度之间穿梭。我曾经驾驶这种飞船到过地球。
prophecies.a_en: Martian spacecraft were plasma-powered and could travel freely through the universe. The ships were circular with multi-layered structures. They also possessed time travel capabilities, able to move between different time dimensions. I once piloted such a craft to Earth.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 等离子推进技术（如离子推进器）目前仅用于小型航天器低推力加速，远不具备星际旅行能力。时间旅行在理论物理中尚无可行方案。截至2026年，人类航天技术未发现任何此类先进飞行器存在的证据。
prophecies.verdict_en: Plasma propulsion (such as ion thrusters) is currently used only for low-thrust acceleration of small spacecraft, far from capable of interstellar travel. Time travel has no feasible solution in theoretical physics. As of 2026, no evidence of such advanced spacecraft has been found.
prophecies.yearReason: 波力斯卡在采访中提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Boriska mentioned this year in interviews

prophecies.q: 波力斯卡描述火星人的外貌与寿命
prophecies.a: 火星人看起来和地球人很相似，但更高大，大约七英尺高。他们可以活到很大年龄，大约是地球人的几十倍。他们通过呼吸火星大气中的二氧化碳生存。火星上的重力和地球不同，所以他们的体型也不同。
prophecies.q_en: Boriska describes Martian appearance and lifespan
prophecies.a_en: Martians looked similar to Earth humans but were taller, about seven feet. They could live to very old ages, roughly dozens of times longer than Earth humans. They survived by breathing carbon dioxide in the Martian atmosphere. Gravity on Mars is different from Earth, so their physique was different.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 火星重力约为地球的38%，理论上可能支持更高大的生物体。但NASA和ESA的火星探测未发现任何现存或曾存在的智慧生命证据。火星大气含95%二氧化碳，但不存在已知能呼吸纯二氧化碳的复杂生命形式。
prophecies.verdict_en: Mars gravity is about 38% of Earth's, which could theoretically support taller organisms. However, NASA and ESA Mars missions have found no evidence of existing or past intelligent life. Mars atmosphere is 95% CO2, but no known complex life forms can breathe pure carbon dioxide.
prophecies.yearReason: 波力斯卡在采访中提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Boriska mentioned this year in interviews

prophecies.q: 波力斯卡预言2009年地球灾难
prophecies.a: 2009年，地球将经历第一次大灾难。某个大陆会遭遇一场巨大的灾难，与水有关。世界上许多人会死亡。
prophecies.a_en: In 2009, Earth will experience its first great catastrophe. A continent will suffer a huge disaster related to water. Many people in the world will perish.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2009年未发生与某大陆相关的毁灭性水灾。当年较大的自然灾害包括萨摩亚海啸（9月，192人死亡）和台风莫拉克（8月，台湾约700人死亡），但均不符合「大陆级灾难」的描述。
prophecies.verdict_en: No continent-scale water catastrophe occurred in 2009. Notable natural disasters that year included the Samoa tsunami (September, 192 deaths) and Typhoon Morakot (August, ~700 deaths in Taiwan), but neither matched the description of a continental-level disaster.
prophecies.yearReason: 波力斯卡在采访中提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Boriska mentioned this year in interviews

prophecies.q: 波力斯卡预言2013年再次灾难
prophecies.a: 2013年会发生另一场更大的灾难。地球将经历严重的考验。
prophecies.a_en: Another, even greater catastrophe will occur in 2013. Earth will face severe trials.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2013年未发生全球性大灾难。当年较大事件包括台风海燕（11月，菲律宾约6300人死亡）和雅安地震（4月，196人死亡），但全球范围内并未出现比以往更严重的整体灾难趋势。
prophecies.verdict_en: No global-scale catastrophe occurred in 2013. Notable events included Typhoon Haiyan (November, ~6,300 deaths in the Philippines) and Ya'an earthquake (April, 196 deaths), but there was no overall trend of worse-than-usual disasters worldwide.
prophecies.yearReason: 波力斯卡在采访中提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: Boriska mentioned this year in interviews

prophecies.q: 波力斯卡预言知识的揭示
prophecies.a: 当狮身人面像被打开的时候，人类将会获得古老的知识。这些知识将改变地球上的生活方式，人们将不再依赖现有的能源形式。但在此之前，地球还要经历一段艰难的时期。
prophecies.q_en: Boriska predicts the revelation of knowledge
prophecies.a_en: When the Sphinx is opened, humanity will gain ancient knowledge. This knowledge will change the way of life on Earth, and people will no longer rely on current forms of energy. But before that, Earth must go through a difficult period.
